items.title: Show HN: boringBar – a taskbar-style dock replacement for macOS
items.raw_content:
Hi HN!

I recently switched from a Fedora/GNOME laptop to a MacBook Air. My old setup served me well as a portable workstation, but I’ve started traveling more while working remotely and needed something with similar performance but better battery life. The main thing I missed was a simple taskbar that shows the windows in the current workspace instead of a Dock that mixes everything together.

I built boringBar so I would not have to use the Dock. It shows only the windows in the current S

items.title: ChatGPT for operations teams
items.raw_content: Learn how operations teams use ChatGPT to streamline workflows, improve coordination, standardize processes, and drive faster execution.

items.title: Applications of AI at OpenAI
items.raw_content: Explore how OpenAI products like ChatGPT, Codex, and APIs bring AI into real-world use for work, development, and everyday tasks.

items.raw_content: Learn how to use ChatGPT to brainstorm ideas, organize thinking, and turn rough concepts into structured, actionable plans.

items.title: Our response to the Axios developer tool compromise
items.raw_content: OpenAI responds to the Axios supply chain attack by rotating macOS code signing certificates, updating apps, and confirming no user data was compromised.

items.title: ChatGPT for marketing teams

items.raw_content: Learn how to use ChatGPT for research to gather sources, analyze information, and create structured, citation-backed insights.

items.title: Financial services
items.raw_content: Explore AI resources for financial services, including prompt packs, GPTs, guides, and tools to help institutions deploy and scale AI securely.

items.title: AI fundamentals
items.raw_content: Learn what AI is, how it works, and how tools like ChatGPT use large language models. A clear, beginner-friendly guide to understanding artificial intelligence.

items.raw_content: Learn how customer success teams use ChatGPT to manage accounts, improve communication, reduce churn, and drive adoption and renewals.

items.title: Getting started with ChatGPT
items.raw_content: Learn how to use ChatGPT, start your first conversation, and discover simple ways to write, brainstorm, and solve problems with AI.

items.title: Research with ChatGPT
items.raw_content: Learn how to research with ChatGPT using search and deep research to find up-to-date information, analyze sources, and generate structured insights.

items.title: Prompting fundamentals
items.raw_content: Learn prompting fundamentals and how to write clear, effective prompts to get better, more useful responses from ChatGPT.

items.title: Using skills
items.raw_content: Learn how to create and use ChatGPT skills to build reusable workflows, automate recurring tasks, and ensure consistent, high-quality outputs.
